name: Axiom
description: Monitor Axiom log analytics datasets and organization access for observability compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Axiom at https://app.axiom.co
2. Go to Settings > API Tokens
3. Create a new API token with read access (or use a Personal Access Token)
4. If using a PAT, also note your Organization ID from Settings > General
5. Enter the values below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Axiom > Settings > API Tokens. Works with both API tokens and Personal Access Tokens (PAT).

credentialFields.label: Organization ID
credentialFields.helpText: Required only if using a Personal Access Token (PAT). Found in Settings > General.

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Axiom datasets are configured for log ingestion and observability

checks.name: Utility Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies Axiom monitors are configured for alerting on log anomalies
